title: Corrective fix for B0038-review: Review Implement TUI Help Overlay Toggle
description:
Blocked reason: Review found a UI regression in the help-overlay close flow that requires implementation work before this bead can be accepted.

Remaining work: Developer follow-up is required in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` around `HelpOverlay.action_close_overlay()` / modal-dismiss flow (currently at lines 527-529) so closing the overlay also refreshes the main screen widgets. Add an interactive regression test that mounts the Textual app and asserts the status panel changes after closing the help overlay; the current tests at `tests/test_tui.py:217-246` only verify runtime state transitions, not rendered UI updates.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0038-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Implemented a minimal corrective fix in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` by extracting `build_tui_app()`, re-rendering panels before opening the modal, and wiring a dismiss callback so the main screen refreshes after the help overlay closes. Added an interactive regression test in `tests/test_tui.py` that mounts the app, opens help, closes it, and verifies the status panel text updates from open to closed.
handoff_summary.remaining: B0038-review can be retried against this implementation. No additional in-scope work remains for this corrective bead.
handoff_summary.risks: The new regression test exercises Textual's headless test harness; if the project later changes Textual versions or screen-stack behavior, this test may need adjustment. Downstream edits in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` should preserve the render-before-push ordering and dismiss callback so modal close continues to refresh the base screen.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry B0038-review and verify the reported help-overlay UI regression is resolved.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Preserve the `question_mark` bindings, modal key swallowing, selection/filter stability, footer `? help` hint, merge-confirmation behavior, and the new render-before-push plus dismiss-callback flow that keeps the main screen synced when the help modal opens or closes.

conflict_risks: Preserve the `question_mark` bindings, modal key swallowing, selection/filter stability, footer `? help` hint, merge-confirmation behavior, and the new render-before-push plus dismiss-callback flow that keeps the main screen synced when the help modal opens or closes.

execution_history.summary: Fixed the TUI help-overlay close path so dismissing the modal re-renders the main screen widgets, and added a mounted Textual regression test for the status panel update.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run targeted validation needed to confirm the implementation.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
